title: clerodendrum umbellatum
intro: Clerodendrum umbellatum, also known as the buttonbush or tropical glorybower, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Clerodendrum umbellatum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make infusions, teas, or decoctions, which are often used to treat various health issues.
